pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh, which explicitly creates this directory and populates it with proxy images.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, which both hardcode and check this directory path.
Verified by checking verifier.py, which awards points for a file count >= 30.
Verified by reading export_result.sh, which explicitly measures the image mean brightness for frames 5, 15, and 25.
Verified by checking verifier.py scoring logic, which expects m5 < m15 < m25, and setup_task.sh, which generates progressively larger white rectangles for the 3 frames.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated proxy mouth shapes (white rectangles of increasing size) located at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/mouth_shapes. The agent must produce an animation sequence of at least 30 frames in /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/lipsync. The evaluation checks the output frames at indices 5, 15, and 25, expecting an ascending order of pixel mass (brightness mean) corresponding to closed, half-open, and wide-open shapes respectively.
